step_1_database.notes: Metadata correctly stored in database by convert_processed_views_to_canvas_data() in PHP

step_2_ajax_response.notes: AJAX response wraps data but preserves metadata integrity

step_3_transformation.logic: Unwraps design_elements → objects format → view-based format with metadata at hive_mind_view.metadata
step_3_transformation.notes: Metadata moves from element_data.metadata to hive_mind_view.metadata during view wrapper creation

extraction_logic.step_2: Search for view wrapper keys with .images property

step_4_classifyDataFormat.console_evidence: 🔍 AGENT 1 MUTEX: Extracted metadata from view wrapper: hive_mind_view
step_4_classifyDataFormat.notes: View wrapper extraction logic works correctly

step_5_applyLegacyDataCorrection.console_evidence: 🔍 LEGACY CORRECTION: Extracted metadata from view wrapper: hive_mind_view
step_5_applyLegacyDataCorrection.notes: Fix applied in commit 3323092 ensures metadata extraction works

metadata_path_trace.critical_insight: Metadata never gets lost - it moves from top-level to view wrapper during transformation, and both extraction points correctly find it using view wrapper search logic

view_wrapper_analysis.why_wrapper_exists: Canvas Reconstruction Engine expects view-based structure (e.g., 'hive_mind_view' or '167359_189542'), not flat objects array

extraction_logic.explanation: Finds keys where value is an object with .images property (identifies view wrappers)
extraction_logic.code: const viewKeys = Object.keys(designData).filter(k => designData[k] && typeof designData[k] === 'object' && designData[k].images);

robustness_reasons: Generic detection: searches for ANY key with .images property
Not hardcoded to specific view names
Works with current AND future view wrapper formats
Falls back gracefully if no wrapper found

edge_cases.risk: LOW - typically only one view per design data object

edge_cases.behavior: metadata remains undefined, detection falls back to top-level

maintainability_concern.issue: DUPLICATED CODE - same extraction logic in two places
maintainability_concern.risk: If extraction logic needs updating, must update BOTH locations

dual_extraction_comparison.divergence_risk: If one function is updated but the other is forgotten, they could extract metadata differently, causing inconsistent classification
dual_extraction_comparison.current_status: SYNCHRONIZED (commit 3323092 applied identical logic to both functions)

capture_version.purpose: Identifies data capture version (modern vs legacy)

designer_offset.purpose: Designer canvas offset (prevents heuristic offset detection)

source.purpose: Primary modern format marker (prevents legacy detection)

metadata_completeness.metadata_quality: EXCELLENT - Contains all required fields plus additional debugging fields

fix_explanation.problem_was: Metadata located at designData.hive_mind_view.metadata, but applyLegacyDataCorrection() only checked designData.metadata (top level)
fix_explanation.why_metadata_moved: During transformDataStructure(), data gets converted from flat 'objects' array to view-wrapper format. The wrapper object (hive_mind_view) contains .images array and .metadata. This is required by Canvas Reconstruction Engine.

broken_code.problem: designData.metadata is undefined (metadata is at designData.hive_mind_view.metadata)
broken_code.result: hasMetadata: false, classified as legacy, applied incorrect correction

fixed_code.logic: Extract metadata from view wrapper first, then check metadata.source
fixed_code.result: hasMetadata: true, metadataSource: 'converted_from_processed_views', classified as modern, no correction applied

why_it_works.step_1: Check if metadata exists at top level (designData.metadata)
why_it_works.step_2: If not found, search for view wrapper objects (objects with .images property)
why_it_works.step_3: Extract metadata from inside the first view wrapper found
why_it_works.step_4: Use extracted metadata for legacy detection logic
why_it_works.outcome: Metadata is found regardless of whether it's at top level or inside view wrapper

safety_analysis.backward_compatibility: SAFE - Falls back to top-level metadata if no wrapper exists
safety_analysis.forward_compatibility: SAFE - Generic detection works with any view wrapper format
safety_analysis.existing_data: SAFE - Doesn't change data, only changes where metadata is read from

edge_cases.behavior: Uses top-level metadata (if (!metadata) check prevents overwrite)

edge_cases.case: Data with both top-level AND wrapper metadata
edge_cases.behavior: Uses top-level metadata (priority to top level)
edge_cases.risk: LOW - unlikely to have both, but prioritization is logical

commit_1.title: Prevent Double Legacy Correction on Converted Golden Standard Data
commit_1.what: Changed PHP to output metadata.source = 'converted_from_processed_views' instead of 'db_processed_views'
commit_1.why: Prevents frontend from detecting converted data as legacy format

commit_2.title: Complete Metadata Propagation - Prevent Legacy Misclassification
commit_2.what: Added view wrapper metadata extraction to classifyDataFormat()
commit_2.why: classifyDataFormat() wasn't finding metadata in view wrappers

commit_3.title: View Wrapper Metadata Extraction in applyLegacyDataCorrection()
commit_3.what: Added IDENTICAL view wrapper extraction logic to applyLegacyDataCorrection()
commit_3.why: Complete the fix - both functions now extract metadata consistently

commit_chain_analysis.fix_completeness: COMPLETE - All three commits work together to ensure metadata propagation
commit_chain_analysis.dependencies: All three commits are required for full fix

before_fix.applyLegacyDataCorrection:
🔍 LEGACY DATA CORRECTION: Analyzing design data... {
  "hasMetadata": false,
  "hasCaptureVersion": false,
  "hasDesignerOffset": false
}
🔧 LEGACY DATA CORRECTION: Element transformed:
  "top": "154.55515149654573 → 234.55515149654573"
before_fix.problem: Metadata not detected, incorrect legacy correction applied

after_fix.classifyDataFormat:
🔍 AGENT 1 MUTEX: Extracted metadata from view wrapper: hive_mind_view
🔍 AGENT 1 MUTEX: Classifying data format... {
  "hasMetadata": true,
  "metadataSource": "converted_from_processed_views",
  "hasCaptureVersion": true,
  "hasDesignerOffset": true
}
✅ AGENT 1 MUTEX: Format = MODERN (converted_from_processed_views with capture_version)
after_fix.applyLegacyDataCorrection:
🔍 LEGACY CORRECTION: Extracted metadata from view wrapper: hive_mind_view
🔍 LEGACY DATA CORRECTION: Analyzing design data... {
  "hasMetadata": true,
  "metadataSource": "converted_from_processed_views",
  "hasCaptureVersion": true,
  "hasDesignerOffset": true
}
✅ LEGACY DATA CORRECTION: Modern format detected - no correction needed
after_fix.solution: Metadata correctly extracted, modern format detected, no correction applied

summary.verdict: PASS - Metadata propagation works correctly at all steps
key_findings: Metadata exists at every step - never lost
Metadata moves from top-level to view wrapper during transformation (expected behavior)
Both extraction points (classifyDataFormat & applyLegacyDataCorrection) use identical logic
Extraction logic is robust and works with any view wrapper format
All required metadata fields are present and correct
Fix prevents double transformation on converted data

remaining_issues.description: Metadata extraction logic duplicated in two functions
remaining_issues.recommendation: Refactor into shared extractMetadata() helper function
remaining_issues.impact: Maintainability concern, not a functional bug

proof_of_correctness: Console logs show metadata extracted successfully
Legacy correction is skipped (no +80px, no ×1.23 scale)

recommendations.recommendation: Refactor metadata extraction into shared helper function
recommendations.benefit: Eliminates code duplication, ensures extraction logic stays synchronized
recommendations.implementation: Create extractMetadata(designData) method in AdminCanvasRenderer class

recommendations.recommendation: Add unit tests for metadata extraction logic
recommendations.benefit: Prevents regression if extraction logic changes
recommendations.implementation: Test with top-level metadata, view wrapper metadata, missing metadata

recommendations.recommendation: Document view wrapper format in code comments
recommendations.benefit: Makes it clear why metadata extraction searches for view wrappers
recommendations.implementation: Add JSDoc explaining transformation → view wrapper → metadata location
